mapper.select: select count(1) from t_piamom_user_profile_stat s left join t_member m on m.id = s.user_id

select s.id, s.user_id, s.follower_count, s.following_count, s.like_count, s.updated_at, IFNULL(m.idno, '') AS user_idno, IFNULL(m.nickname, '') AS user_nickname from t_piamom_user_profile_stat s left join t_member m on m.id = s.user_id where s.id = #{id}

select s.id, s.user_id, s.follower_count, s.following_count, s.like_count, s.updated_at, IFNULL(m.idno, '') AS user_idno, IFNULL(m.nickname, '') AS user_nickname from t_piamom_user_profile_stat s left join t_member m on m.id = s.user_id where s.user_id = #{userId}
